project.name: Dr Yuqian Zhang — Academic Website
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Academic personal platform, warm ivory + deep pine green, Newsreader serif headings + Inter UI, editorial reading rhythm, restrained surfaces, publication-grade credibility.
project.designRead: Academic personal site / peers+students+collaborators / calm scholarly credibility / medium density / avoid generic startup hero and card wall

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: deep pine green (#1f4d3f) for primary CTA, links, active nav, section rules
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single brand hue; categories/rank tags use neutral tints and primary tints only, no secondary/accent brand hue

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: restrained radius: cards 8-14px, pills 9999px, inputs 8px; hairline 1px borders in --scholar-border
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Headings/prose: Newsreader serif (weight 400-500); UI/labels/body: Inter; code/DOI: IBM Plex Mono. Eyebrows uppercase Inter with wide tracking.
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: generous editorial spacing; section padding py-20 to py-28; max reading width ~72ch
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: bordered ivory cards on ivory background, thin rules, serif titles + sans metadata, rank tag pills, quiet hover lift
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: static surfaces use 1px borders and subtle layering; shadow alpha <=0.05 for cards; deeper shadow only for floating layers
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: one portrait-style hero visual + one abstract data/manuscript texture; Lucide line icons at small sizes
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: quiet and precise: 150-250ms ease, 1-2px hover lift, underline reveal on links, no bounce

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: Full-width sticky top nav on ivory: left wordmark 'Yuqian Zhang' in serif with small 'PhD' mark, center/right Inter nav links (Home, Research, Data & Code, Insights, Contact), active link uses pine green with underline; footer with contact, ORCID, quick links, copyright
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: single primary pine green var(--scholar-primary); tints via --scholar-primary-100..900
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Newsreader serif headings/prose + Inter UI + IBM Plex Mono for DOI/code
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: ivory cards with 1px --scholar-border, shadow alpha <=0.05; floating layers may use --scholar-shadow-float
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: primary: pine green solid, ivory text, radius 8px, subtle hover darken+1px lift; secondary: bordered ghost with pine text
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: 12-col mental grid, left-aligned editorial blocks, consistent baseline, no orphan micro-rows

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Editorial scholarly: warm ivory (#f7f4ec) canvas, deep pine green (#1f4d3f) single primary, Newsreader serif + Inter, restrained radius (8-14px), low static shadow, publication-grade credibility.

pages.title: Home
pages.businessScenario: Academic identity landing: who Dr Zhang is, research focus areas, selected publications, latest writing and data/code, invitation to collaborate
pages.visualNorthStar: A calm, publication-grade first impression that reads like the cover of a thoughtful journal: serif name, clear research positioning, and immediate proof of scholarship, not a startup hero
pages.compositionPattern: Asymmetric editorial split hero (name + positioning left, portrait/credential card right) followed by alternating editorial rows

pages.title: Research & Publications
pages.businessScenario: Filterable scholarly record: journal articles, working papers/under review, conference papers, with ABDC/Scopus rank tags, DOI/SSRN links, year filter, search, and a publications-by-year chart
pages.visualNorthStar: A rigorous, easy-to-scan research index where rank tags and links are instantly legible and the record feels authoritative
pages.compositionPattern: Filter/search toolbar + metrics strip + chart, then a structured citation list grouped by type
qualityRisks: dense citation list must stay readable
many rank tags must not wrap badly

pages.title: Data & Code
pages.businessScenario: Reproducible research hub: datasets, Python/R tools and projects (cybersecurity risk topic modelling, DCA reinvestment simulation, IFRS Google Trends), with language tags, repo/SSRN/download links and reproducibility notes
pages.visualNorthStar: A practical, trustworthy resource shelf that signals reproducibility and open scholarship, with clear language/tool tags
pages.compositionPattern: Intro + reproducibility principles strip, then a project card grid with tags and action links

pages.title: Insights
pages.businessScenario: Writing space for thoughts, ideas and commentary on accounting research, AI/digital transformation, ESG and pedagogy: featured essay + topic filter + article listing
pages.visualNorthStar: An inviting editorial magazine feel that makes long-form thinking look worth reading
pages.compositionPattern: Featured lead article (large) + topic filter row + two-column article list
qualityRisks: featured article must anchor the page

pages.title: Article
pages.businessScenario: Readable long-form essay template: title, byline/date/reading time, lead image, serif prose body with pull quote, figure, footnotes, share and related reading
pages.visualNorthStar: A distraction-free, beautifully typeset reading experience centred on serif prose at a comfortable measure
pages.compositionPattern: Centred article masthead + single-column serif prose with a progress indicator and margin metadata

pages.title: Contact
pages.businessScenario: Contact and collaboration: enquiry form (name, email, purpose, message), direct contact details, collaboration areas (PhD supervision, co-authoring, reviewing, speaking), affiliations
pages.visualNorthStar: An approachable but professional contact surface that makes reaching out and understanding collaboration options effortless
pages.compositionPattern: Two-column: left contact intro + details + collaboration list, right enquiry form leading to one submit

assets.semanticDescription: Editorial portrait-style abstract: warm study desk with books, papers and soft window light, scholarly mood
Abstract close-up of printed manuscript pages and annotations in warm tones, subtle texture
Abstract concept image for AI and accounting text analysis: layered documents and subtle data patterns, warm neutral palette
Calm editorial lead image evoking research and reflection: open notebook and reading light on a warm desk
